title: capsella integrella
intro: Capsella integrella, also known as honesty or small cress, is a plant species in the mustard family with a distinctive seed pod that splits open to reveal its seeds, often referred to as "honesty" because the seeds are visible from the outside. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The seeds and leaves of Capsella integrella are believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, making it a potential remedy for conditions like bronchitis and asthma. Capsella integrella can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it has also been used in traditional remedies, such as poultices and salves, to treat skin conditions and wounds.
